CustomField.formula: IF(OR( Product_Line__c ='AVC',Product_Line__c ='AVS',Product_Line__c ='ELM',Product_Line__c ='ISS',Product_Line__c ='QAS',Product_Line__c ='DSK',Product_Line__c ='ENT',Product_Line__c ='ATT'),'INF Product', IF(OR(Product_Line__c ='AGT',Product_Line__c ='OMV',Product_Line__c ='OSAI',Product_Line__c ='OSC',Product_Line__c ='OSAM',Product_Line__c ='OSRL',Product_Line__c ='OSSS',Product_Line__c ='SVC',Product_Line__c ='TMO',Product_Line__c ='WAT'),'OneSource Product', IF(OR ( Product_Line__c = "APS", Product_Line__c = "ARS", Product_Line__c = "AWS", Product_Line__c = "CLH", Product_Line__c = "CLR", Product_Line__c = "DIS", Product_Line__c = "FAP", Product_Line__c = "HCS", Product_Line__c = "HTS", Product_Line__c = "IAS", Product_Line__c = "INV", Product_Line__c = "LVI", Product_Line__c = "MFT", Product_Line__c = "MLD", Product_Line__c = "MOL", Product_Line__c = "MOX", Product_Line__c = "NMO", Product_Line__c = "NVS", Product_Line__c = "PBR", Product_Line__c = "PGI", Product_Line__c = "QTS", Product_Line__c = "RRD", Product_Line__c = "RRS", Product_Line__c = "SPS", Product_Line__c = "TBR", Product_Line__c = "TIS", Product_Line__c = "TSC", Product_Line__c = "EZR" ),'LST',Product_Line__c)))
CustomField.label: Bucket Field: Product Line
